<!-- SPECKIT START -->

Project quick refs (link, do not duplicate):

- Product + setup overview: [README.md](../README.md)
- Architecture, commands, env vars: [CLAUDE.md](../.claude/CLAUDE.md)
- Feature plans live under [specs/](../specs/). Use the most recent folder's plan.md as the "current plan".

Build/lint gates:

- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run lint`

Conventions:

- Use Node 22+.
- Tooling: Biome for linting; tsdown for builds; tsx for dev.
- Prefer editing code in src/; keep skills/ as installed SKILL.md artifacts.
<!-- SPECKIT END -->
